payload.content: Every factual statement in your summary must cite the passage title it came from in the form '[Title]: <statement>'. If a statement cannot be tied to a specific retrieved passage, omit it.

rationale: Counterfactual probe: GEPA's HoVer summarize1 prompt has nothing for verify-before-output. Tests whether forcing per-statement title attribution reduces fabrication and improves hop-2 retrievability via title-grounded summaries.
